prompt: Create a high-quality cinematic double-exposure paper-tear collage portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman. Use a vertical 3:4 canvas. The upper two-thirds show a huge ethereal close-up portrait of the same woman, softly blended into a pale cloudy background, with long silky black hair parted to one side, warm fair-to-medium skin tone, delicate features, and ornate gold jhumka earrings visible; make this portrait dreamy, softly focused, and backlit by warm sunset haze. Across the middle of the image place one horizontal torn white paper edge, ragged and realistic, separating the close-up portrait from the lower scene. In the lower half, show the same woman full body walking toward the camera on a rainy city street at dusk, centered in the frame, wearing an elegant teal Pakistani embroidered designer suit with gold embroidery, matching wide trousers, and a sheer teal dupatta with gold border draped over one shoulder. The street should be wet and reflective, with warm golden bokeh lights, blurred buildings, soft mist, and cinematic depth of field. Her pose is graceful and confident, one hand lightly holding the dupatta, the other relaxed while walking. Use realistic photography, premium fashion editorial styling, soft warm highlights, teal-and-gold color harmony, shallow depth of field, dramatic atmosphere, and clean high-resolution detail. Keep exactly two depictions of the woman: one giant close-up portrait above and one smaller full-body figure below. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no duplicate faces.
